product_surfaces: cmd/gitcode-mcp/main.go — CLI binary entrypoint routes migrate-cache as a local command
internal/cli/cli.go — migrate-cache command routing, JSON/text rendering, cache path resolution, and status semantics
internal/cache/migrate.go — cache migration API using schema_version table and writer lock
internal/cache/schema.go — existing schema migrations and currentSchemaVersion target reused by migrate-cache
freshness: Current binary built from ./cmd/gitcode-mcp into the validation task directory; offline deterministic run with temporary SQLite cache files

mocks_used.external_dependencies: None. Validation uses local SQLite caches only and does not access network services or credentials.
mocks_used.fixtures: Temporary cache files are created under mktemp by the validation script and removed on exit.

validation_scope: Validation artifacts are limited to tests/design_package/005-cmd-gitcode-mcp-task-5-add-migrate-cache-cli-command/. The script builds a local binary in that directory and writes temporary runtime files under mktemp only.

live_validation.reason: Cache migration is an offline local database operation and must not require live GitCode access, credentials, or network availability.
